data.name: Furry Hentai Tangram
data.detailed_description:
OUR GAMES



關於此遊戲

In Furry Hentai Tangram, you’ll solve tangram puzzles while enjoying beautiful art.

To clear a level you need to place all the available pieces on the given pattern. But they can't overlap!

Explore a 3D hallway full of cute paintings, and build your gallery with images from the tangram puzzles you’ve completed.

Experience the timeless joy of 65 different tangram puzzles.

FEATURES
  • Tangram puzzle gameplay
  • 65 different levels
  • 26 different images to unlock
  • Beautiful images of lovely furry girls
  • Gallery mode
  • Includes "Streamer mode" with censored images

data.short_description: Enjoy a light challenge with beautiful visuals on this relaxing puzzle game full of cute furry girls!
data.supported_languages: 英文, 法文, 義大利文, 德文, 西班牙文 - 西班牙, 日文, 韓文, 簡體中文, 繁體中文

pc_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統 *: Windows 7
  • 處理器: AMD Athlon
  • 記憶體: 1024 MB 記憶體
  • 儲存空間: 256 MB 可用空間
